description: Field specification for Nightmare Benchmark v1 - Multi-LOB commercial insurance extraction

sov.description: Schedule of Values / Property Schedule extraction

sov.location_count_mismatch: Extracted location count differs from ground truth by >1
sov.tiv_off_10pct: Total TIV differs from ground truth by >10%
sov.hallucinated_locations: Extracted more locations than exist in document
sov.zero_locations: Extracted zero locations from non-empty SOV

loss_run.claim_count_off_20pct: Extracted claim count differs from ground truth by >20%
loss_run.incurred_off_15pct: Total incurred differs from ground truth by >15%
loss_run.coverage_misclassification: >25% of claims assigned to wrong coverage type
loss_run.zero_claims: Extracted zero claims from non-empty loss run

N1_easy.description: Clean documents, no artifacts, standard formatting

N2_normal.description: Minor formatting quirks, some merged cells

N3_hard.description: Multi-tab Excel, buried headers, some scan artifacts

N4_expert.description: Hidden columns, multi-building entries, tilted scans

N5_nightmare.description: Everything breaks: cross-doc refs, handwritten notes, encoding issues
